_comment: Species: Void Fissure Beast (虚裂兽) from Beyond the Timescape. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Void Fissure Beast

canonical.appearance: Beast that IS a void fissure, body is a moving tear in reality 10 m
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by widening reality tears; hunts by pulling prey into void
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: void_fissure_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
